name: Ben Carson
subject: Peter, I think you're going to like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31700354:suDnW1yNq:m:1:876315805:9EF918E1735196668D03A031828795FE:r)
---

Peter,

Over the course of this campaign, I have been to hundreds of towns and cities across this great country.

**But what about yours? **Now is your chance to make that happen. Let me explain...

We are right on the verge of a huge milestone -- one million individual grassroots donations. So today, we've launched a massive fundraising drive to help us get there.

**[If your donation happens to be our one millionth donation, I will put your town on my calendar and campaign there for a day.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31700354:suDnW1yNq:m:1:876315805:9EF918E1735196668D03A031828795FE:r)**
You can donate any amount, and even encourage others in your town to do the same.

We're always trying to find new ways to show appreciation to our most dedicated supporters, and I think this could be pretty cool. [**So please go ahead and make your donation now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31700354:suDnW1yNq:m:1:876315805:9EF918E1735196668D03A031828795FE:r)

At the very least, you'll be helping to take this campaign to a whole new level.

Thanks for all you do.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31700355:suDnW1yNq:m:1:876315805:9EF918E1735196668D03A031828795FE:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31700356:suDnW1yNq:m:1:876315805:9EF918E1735196668D03A031828795FE:r)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: #GrahamPlan to defeat radical Islam
body:
Friend, I have a plan to defeat ISIL. | |

---
---
|
Friend,

**I am the only candidate for president who has a realistic plan to defeat ISIL.** From my 35 trips to the Middle East over the last decade, I have developed the relationships with leaders and understanding of the region to know what must be done to win against these evil terrorists.

I believe we must do whatever it takes, as long as it takes to defeat radical Islam. My strategic vision of how we win this war and keep America safe is laid out in detail in the **#GrahamPlan** , [**which you can read here**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31718247:sm9YS1yN5:m:1:877327319:2CC5374176BFD403F891E420221FE467:r).

Friend, we cannot afford to wait until January 2017 to change our strategy and tactics in this war. By releasing my plan now, I hope it will serve as a road map for President Obama to defeat ISIL and stop the growing threat of radical Islamic terrorism. We cannot wait another six months or, God forbid, for an attack on our homeland.

There is no other way to defeat this threat - we must go in on the ground and stop them over there. **That is just part of my #GrahamPlan.** [**Please read more about it by following this link.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31718247:sm9YS1yN5:m:1:877327319:2CC5374176BFD403F891E420221FE467:r)

This week there was an article in _The New York Times_ that outlined where ISIL attacks have occurred and the countries where ISIL operates. Countries and regions in yellow are where ISIL has declared provinces:

Friend, if you are running for president and aren't convinced that we need strong U.S. military action now to defeat radical Islam, I don't believe you are qualified to be Commander-in-Chief. We must implement the **#GrahamPlan** to stop the spread of these terrorists.

I am ready to keep America safe and lead our great nation on day one.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

PS. After you read my **#GrahamPlan to defeat radical Islam** , I hope you will consider supporting my campaign with your time and resources. I'm ready to be Commander-in-Chief on day one, confront our enemies and keep America safe. [**Won't you please help today?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31718248:sm9YS1yN5:m:1:877327319:2CC5374176BFD403F891E420221FE467:r) Thanks.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31718248:sm9YS1yN5:m:1:877327319:2CC5374176BFD403F891E420221FE467:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Defund Dangerous Refugees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative, The tragedy in Paris was a big lesson for us in America. Open borders and blanket amnesty without proper security are not options if we want our country to be safe here at home. It is unfortunate, but the events have reminded us exactly why we need be extraordinarily cautious in who we allow to immigrate, visit, or study in this country. For years, I have called for limitations on admitting foreigners who want to come from countries consumed with hate for America, and I have called for reinstating a program of special scrutiny for anyone coming here from countries that have hotbeds of radical jihadism. I previously put forth an Amendment to the immigration bill called 'Trust but Verify' that would have made our country more safe. Unfortunately, that bill was blocked by Marco Rubio and Chuck Schumer's backroom deal with the Gang of 8. Now I am doing three more things to improve the security of our country:
1. **I put forth a bill to stop terrorists from entering the country as refugees.**

2. **I am working to stop the funding of ISIS abroad. I wrote a Time Op-Ed this week that demonstrated my position on holding people, non-profits, and governments accountable for funding ISIS.**

3. **I am working to defund taxpayer dollars from facilitating refugees from dangerous countries.**

We have no choice but to put strict policies in place to keep our country safe. That is why this morning I announced an amendment to the Transportation, Housing, and Urban Development Appropriations Act to defund new refugees from high-risk countries. If the administration doesn't have the ability to guarantee that the vetting process is working, if Americans cannot be guaranteed that we are not allowing terrorists to enter this country disguised as refugees, then we cannot continue to fund their entrance into this nation. The security of our nation must be a top priority. Now is not the time for backroom deals with Chuck Schumer and the liberal Democrats. Now is the time to stand strong for the security of our country and make certain that protections are in place to make sure what happened in Paris does not happen here in America. [Will you stand with me in support of my bill to defund the unsafe plans to allow Syrian refugees asylum in America?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31718765:WYNk51ySN:m:1:879035888:CEB606E800705CAAB3B17DBA5136F5D4:r) In Liberty, Rand Paul | | [Give $10 Today >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31718766:WYNk51ySN:m:1:879035888:CEB606E800705CAAB3B17DBA5136F5D4:r)
---
[Give $25 Today >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31718767:WYNk51ySN:m:1:879035888:CEB606E800705CAAB3B17DBA5136F5D4:r)
[Give $50 Today >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31718768:WYNk51ySN:m:1:879035888:CEB606E800705CAAB3B17DBA5136F5D4:r)
[Give $100 Today >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31718769:WYNk51ySN:m:1:879035888:CEB606E800705CAAB3B17DBA5136F5D4:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31718770:WYNk51ySN:m:1:879035888:CEB606E800705CAAB3B17DBA5136F5D4:r)

name: Elise Dietsch
subject: FW: My friends and family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Got this email from Christina and **I'm in.**

**[I just made a donation here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44964550:J3A3T3LNl:m:1:1516426255:364E71677CB88A83AA6C3D063D3CB6BE:r)**.
Peter, **[will you join us by making a donation today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44964550:J3A3T3LNl:m:1:1516426255:364E71677CB88A83AA6C3D063D3CB6BE:r)** Governor Christie would appreciate knowing he has your support!

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Christina Egea
Date: Tue, Nov 17, 2015
Subject: My friends and family

|
---
| |
---|---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44964550:J3A3T3LNl:m:1:1516426255:364E71677CB88A83AA6C3D063D3CB6BE:r) |
| | | Elise, What a difference between Governor Christie's performance in last Tuesday's Republican debate and Hillary Clinton's in Saturday's Democratic debate. Governor Christie's debate performance last week was widely considered to be the best. He made strong, bold statements on the most important issues facing this country and remained focused on the goal: ensuring that a Hillary Clinton presidency remains a liberal fantasy.
The Governor sums up the reason we need to be focused on Hillary with this important message:
> _If you listen to Hillary Clinton, she's made it very clear: She believes that she can make decisions for you better than you can make them for yourself._
This is exactly why we are working to make Governor Christie the President of the United States. He will take on Hillary Clinton with his clear vision and bold leadership. That's why today, **_I'm making a donation to my boss._** He is the most tested, mature candidate in this race. And make no mistake, he is the ONLY person who can beat Hillary next fall. In addition to making a donation myself, I'm going to ask my family and friends to do so. **[That is why I'm asking you, can you make a donation to help Governor Christie? $5, $10, $25, or more would go a long way towards making sure he can make his visions for our country a reality](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44964550:J3A3T3LNl:m:1:1516426255:364E71677CB88A83AA6C3D063D3CB6BE:r). ** Thank you for your time,
Christina
Chris Christie 2016 [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44964550:J3A3T3LNl:m:1:1516426255:364E71677CB88A83AA6C3D063D3CB6BE:r)
---

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44964551:J3A3T3LNl:m:1:1516426255:364E71677CB88A83AA6C3D063D3CB6BE:r)
---

name: Mike Mikus
subject: Kochs approaching
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

By now you must have heard the news: **groups tied to the billionaire Koch brothers have already flooded Pennsylvania 's airwaves with special interest funded ads aimed at buying victories for Republicans at the polls.**

Now here's the scary part: when Senator Pat Toomey ran in 2010, outside groups spent over $16 million attacking Democrats and supporting Toomey. We've got to believe they'll spend even more this time around to protect him.

We're going to have to double down and make sure Katie is in the best possible position to win.

**To beat Toomey and the Kochs, it 's going to take an unstoppable network of grassroots supporters. [I hope Katie can count on you: Chip in $5 right now to support Katie and stand strong against the Kochs.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9012639535196012544/6310408393597124608?refcode=e20151118nd&amount=5)**

Sincerely,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9012639535196012544/6310408393597124608?refcode=e20151118nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9012639535196012544/6238350799559196672).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Chelsea Clinton
subject: RSVP to meet my dad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Meet my dad on the trail for dinner. | Friend --

My dad truly loves meeting people, particularly people who share his support for my mom! That’s why he is so excited for this upcoming dinner with some of my mom’s best supporters.

You could be there. **[All you have to do is toss your name in the hat right now, and the rest is on the campaign.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQwMTk0ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNzI0NjU2S0&mt=1&rt=0)** It’s a dinner you won’t want to miss -- my dad is great company.

Be ready to talk about what issues matter most to you, what books you’re reading, and what else you do in your free time. And a friendly tip: There’s a reason people call him the explainer-in-chief, so ask whatever questions you’ve got. He’ll happily oblige!

**This will be a dinner to remember. Enter for a chance to be there now:**
[ | | [**RSVP for dinner**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQwMTk0ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNzI0NjU2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Chelsea

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Poll Surge!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
The post-debate momentum continues to build!
Rand Paul won the debate last week and
analysts across the country said it was his best moment of the
campaign so far. The momentum continued last week with a
successful $500,000 Debate Victory Money Bomb.
Now the polls are coming out and they're are
all positive. Here is the well-respected Reuters poll that is
being shown on news channels across the country today.

According to this, Rand Paul passed Ted Cruz
and Jeb Bush and moved into 4th place, just two points behind
Marco Rubio.
(Marco Rubio continues to be plagued by his
past support for amnesty and teaming up with liberal Senator
Chuck Schumer)
There is also a poll out of New Hampshire
this morning that shows Rand Paul gaining two points since the
debate. He is on an upward trend in every poll.
We can keep this momentum going but we need
support from committed supporters such as you.
Here is what we will be doing over the next
couple of days:

We will continue to hold Marco Rubio
accountable for blocking Rand's amendment to make our immigration
policies more secure.

We will highlight Rand's efforts to block
taxpayer benefits from new refugees from high risk countries.

But in order to keep the momentum going we
need financial support from our supporters.
Can we count on you to #StandwithRand as our
momentum builds?
In Liberty,
Doug Stafford

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Rand Paul
subject: Help Me Make The Senate Act on Refugee Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Today I introduced an amendment that will stop welfare to future
refugees needs a vote in the senate. It is exactly what America
needs, and exactly when.
But it might not get a vote unless you act
today.
Make no mistake, we have been attacked in the
past by refugees or by people posing as refugees. The two Boston
bombers were here as refugees. They didn't take very kindly to
what we gave them -- education, food, clothing, and they chose to
attack our country.

Should we just continue to let them in
without proper screening? To allow them to live off of American
tax dollars without any certainty of American safety? I think
not.

We currently have an insufficient process for
knowing who's here legally and illegally. There are eleven
million people in our country illegally, 40% of them have
overstayed their Visa. Do we know who they are? Do we know where
they are? Hardly. We can't just continue to add people to the
rolls of those coming from the Middle East until we know exactly
who they are and what their intentions might be.

We borrow a million dollars a minute already.
We don't have enough money. We don't have the resources. And
frankly, we do not have the the heart to subject our country to
this great national security risk.

Let's send a message to the President that
the people have spoken, we are unhappy with your refugee program.
Demand a vote today.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Team Kasich
subject: Gov. John Kasich's TIME Op-Ed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

We wanted to share with you Gov. John Kasich's op-ed that ran today in TIME. Please take a few minutes to read this and consider sharing it with your contacts.

Also be sure to watch the video of Gov. Kasich's remarks yesterday when he announced his National Security Plan: [JohnKasich.com/NationalSecurity](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31725884:sHAarmyN8:m:1:958431888:AA4042FA8912505558692BF122002D29:r)

\--

**[TIME: John Kasich: We Need Boots on the Ground to Defeat ISIS](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31725885:sHAarmyN8:m:1:958431888:AA4042FA8912505558692BF122002D29:r)

**
**We must defend our very way of life

**
The attacks on Paris should serve as a wakeup call for anyone who may have failed to recognize that we are fighting a global war against ISIS and radical Islam. We can and must defeat them tactically and strategically. We can't wait any longer to build a military coalition that wipes them out, degrades and destroys them.

ISIS, with their brutal attacks on women, their beheadings and their attacks on people of faith is at war with civilization. ISIS represents more than a national security threat. It is deeper. They want to destroy our way of life and bring an end to the West.

Unless we want to see the blood spilled in Paris flow here in America and in the streets of our allies' capitals, we need to get serious about wiping ISIS off the map. Negotiation, ambivalence and delay are unacceptable. There can be no negotiating or delay with this darkness; we simply must defeat it.

We must join a coalition with our European and Middle Eastern allies to defeat and destroy ISIS on the ground. Bombings are not enough. We must root them out and destroy them. By attacking Paris, ISIS declared war not just on France but on the West. By rising to the occasion we are not just defending the West militarily. We are defending our very way of life.

In addition to destroying ISIS with a coalition of boots on the ground, we must arm moderates, we must arm the Kurdis in both Syria and Iraq in order to help them defend their homelands and take the fight to ISIS as we prepare our collective response. With a coalition we must create and enforce no-fly zones in Syria where refugees can find shelter. Our allies in the region must provide sanctuary for those displaced by war.

For too long we have shown an unwillingness to lead. One administration official said we should lead from behind. This is unacceptable. If America does not lead, we will leave the world a much more dangerous place. There is no doubt we can win the battle with bullets and weapons, and we must do so now. But, more important, we must win the battle of ideas. If we defeat ISIS without also defeating its twisted ideology, similar organizations will take its place.

The West must remember its root values. While ISIS seeks to shed the blood of anyone who believes differently, the West recommit itself to what it believes and make it heard around the world. That means improving public diplomacy and using the Internet, social media and video to proclaim our ideas and counter the extremists' lies. ISIS uses every medium possible to spread their message of hate. We must attack them where they are working to gather new recruits and spreading their propaganda--the arena of ideas.

Throughout history Americans have always defended our values and ideas. We are once again at a tipping point. We must gather ourselves and rally our allies for this fight that must be won. I am confident we can do it. Each time our nation has faced a challenge we have risen to meet it. This is no different, but the stakes could not be higher. Our way of life depends on it.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31725886:sHAarmyN8:m:1:958431888:AA4042FA8912505558692BF122002D29:r)

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/isHAarmyN8). [Update your preferences](http://email.sermodigital.com/p/osHAarmyN8)
